items.title_en: Mercedes-Benz may be shut out of U.S. market under bill aimed at Chinese automaker ownership

items.desc_en: Mercedes-Benz's largest individual shareholder is BAIC, a Chinese state-owned automaker. Sources told CNBC that exemptions in the legislation would not apply.
items.desc_zh: 梅赛德斯-奔驰最大的个人股东是中国国有汽车制造商北汽集团。消息人士告诉 CNBC，该立法中的豁免条款不适用。

items.title_en: American households pay nearly $450 more on average for energy amid Iran War, data shows

items.desc_en: Higher energy costs can force consumers to raid their savings and lean more into debt to cover expenses.
items.desc_zh: 能源成本上升可能迫使消费者动用储蓄并更多地借债来支付开支。

items.title_en: Roth IRA owners may need a second retirement account to claim the new Saver's Match

items.desc_en: The Saver's Match program, which starts in 2027, is for lower- and moderate-income retirement savers — but Roth IRA owners may face a hurdle to get the money.

items.title_zh: 气温高达 45 摄氏度，德里穷人的生存先于安全
items.desc_en: As temperatures peak, Delhi’s informal workers continue working despite growing health risks.
items.desc_zh: 随着气温达到顶峰，德里的非正规工人尽管健康风险不断增加，但仍继续工作。

items.title_en: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
items.title_zh: 宝马称人形机器人是汽车制造的“未来”
items.desc_en: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.
items.desc_zh: 宝马正在向欧洲的一家汽车工厂引入人形机器人，其基础是美国的类似项目。

items.title_en: US and Iran reach tentative deal to extend ceasefire, US officials say
items.title_zh: 美国官员称，美国和伊朗达成延长停火的临时协议
items.desc_en: But there has been conflicting information from Tehran, with one news agency reporting that no deal has been finalised or confirmed.
items.desc_zh: 但德黑兰方面的信息相互矛盾，一家新闻机构报道称，尚未敲定或确认任何协议。

items.title_en: Man jailed for 15 years over plot to attack Taylor Swift concert in Vienna
items.title_zh: 男子因密谋袭击泰勒·斯威夫特维也纳演唱会被判入狱 15 年
items.desc_en: A 21-year-old Austrian man admitted planning the attack and other terrorism-related offences.
items.desc_zh: 一名 21 岁的奥地利男子承认策划了这次袭击和其他与恐怖主义有关的罪行。

items.title_en: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
items.title_zh: 加州总检察长因 2023 年数据泄露起诉 23andMe 继任者
items.desc_en: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.
items.desc_zh: 司法部长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 指控该公司在泄露事件的严重性方面撒了谎。

items.title_en: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
items.title_zh: 加沙城医院称，以色列针对哈马斯领导人发动袭击，造成多人死亡
items.desc_en: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，至少五名儿童在这次袭击中丧生，袭击目标似乎是一名哈马斯指挥官。

items.title_en: Villas, cars and cash: Italy seizes dead Mafia mobster's millions
items.title_zh: 别墅、汽车和现金：意大利没收了死去的黑手党黑帮的数百万美元
items.desc_en: Police say the operation targeted the network of notorious late Sicilian mafia boss Matteo Messina Denaro.
items.desc_zh: 警方表示，这次行动的目标是臭名昭著的已故西西里黑手党老大马泰奥·梅西纳·德纳罗的网络。

items.desc_zh: 伦敦国王学院的研究人员希望该芯片能够帮助回答有关最重要的自然过程的先前无法回答的问题。

items.desc_zh: 数百名用户联系了 BBC，声称他们被错误地禁止访问这些网站。

items.title_en: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
items.title_zh: 色情公司因年龄检查失败被 Ofcom 罚款 60 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。

items.title_en: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.title_zh: 道德黑客冠军警告像 Mythos 这样的人工智能工具可能会让她破产
items.desc_en: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_en: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.title_zh: 政府誓言年底前对 16 岁以下儿童实施社交媒体限制
items.desc_en: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.
items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。
